NO ARGUMENT MADE AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT CATERPILLAR INC.'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE IS GRANTED. Notice Of Motion To Continue Or Vacate The Trial Date
Off Calendar Aug-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Elizabeth Branham of WALSWORTH FRANKLIN BEVINS & McCALL, LLP (415-781-7072), appearing for defendant / moving party Caterpillar, Inc.
Jennifer L. Alesio of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff Thomas Morris

RULING:
DEFENDANT CATERPILLAR, INC.'S MOTION TO CONTINUE OR VACATE THE TRIAL DATE

No argument made and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Caterpillar Inc.'s motion to continue the trial date is granted. The trial date is continued to February 25, 2013 at 11:15am in Department 503. This case is severed from Brayton Group 615 and added to Brayton Group 622. The new trial date will be considered the initial trial date for discovery purposes as to all parties. No party opposed defendant's motion. The Court further ordered that the case will be governed by the case management order issued on 6/19/2012. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)
